zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Grenling於大約1500年出生在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Grenling29歲，母親Johane25歲。他於大約1524年與Rose Barber在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年12月8日在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Grenling于大约1500年出生在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Grenling29岁，母亲Johane25岁。他于大约1524年与Rose Barber在英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年12月8日在英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grenling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Grenling was born about 1500, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Grenling, was 29 and his mother, Johane, was 25. He married Rose Barber about 1524, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 8 December 1558, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Grenling est né environ 1500, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Grenling, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johane, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Rose Barber environ 1524, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1558, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Grenling um 1500 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Grenling 29 und seine Mutter Johane 25. Er hat um 1524 in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Rose Barber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1558 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Grenling è nato il circa 1500 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Grenling, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Johane, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Rose Barber circa 1524, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 dicembre 1558, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Grenlingが約1500年にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Grenlingは29歳，母Johaneは25歳であった。約1524年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストラドブロクでRose Barberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年12月8日にイギリスイギリススフォルクストラドブロクで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Grenling(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Grenling(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Johane(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 Rose Barber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Grenling nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Grenling, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Johane, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose Barber aproximadamente 1524, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1558, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Grenling родился около 1500 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Grenling было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johane, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose Barber около 1524 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 декабря 1558 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Grenling nació aproximadamente 1500, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Grenling, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Johane, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Rose Barber aproximadamente 1524, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1558, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
